evals.prompt: Write user stories for a team invitation feature. Admins can invite members via email, set their role (admin/member/viewer), invitees receive an email with a link, and they can accept or decline. Invited users who don't have an account should be prompted to create one.
evals.expected_output: Numbered user stories with acceptance criteria, edge cases, and priorities

assertions.name: as_i_want_format
assertions.description: Stories in As a [role] / I want / So that format

assertions.name: numbered_ids
assertions.description: Stories numbered US-001, US-002, etc.

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Each story has Given/When/Then acceptance criteria

assertions.name: edge_cases
assertions.description: Covers expired invite, already-member invite, new user flow

assertions.name: role_specific
assertions.description: Different stories for admin (sending) and invitee (receiving)

evals.prompt: Generate user stories for an e-commerce checkout flow. Cart review, shipping address (saved + new), payment (card + Apple Pay), order confirmation, and email receipt. Users can be logged in or guests.
evals.expected_output: Stories covering logged-in and guest checkout paths with payment and shipping variants

assertions.name: guest_vs_logged_in
assertions.description: Separate stories or criteria for guest and authenticated users

assertions.name: payment_variants
assertions.description: Stories for card payment and Apple Pay

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Testable criteria including error scenarios (payment declined)

assertions.name: priorities
assertions.description: Stories prioritized (checkout flow P0, Apple Pay P1)

assertions.name: edge_cases
assertions.description: Out of stock during checkout, expired session, address validation

evals.prompt: Write user stories for a notification preferences page. Users can configure which events trigger notifications (comments, assignments, due dates, mentions) and choose channels (in-app, email, push) per event type. They should also be able to set quiet hours.
evals.expected_output: Stories for viewing preferences, toggling channels per event, quiet hours, and defaults for new users

assertions.name: per_event_channel
assertions.description: Stories cover choosing notification channel per event type

assertions.name: quiet_hours
assertions.description: Story for configuring quiet hours (start/end time, timezone)

assertions.name: defaults
assertions.description: Story for default notification settings for new users

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Testable criteria for toggle behavior

assertions.name: split_appropriately
assertions.description: Stories sized S-L, not a single XL story

evals.prompt: Generate user stories for a file management feature. Users can upload files (drag & drop or click), organize into folders, share files with team members (view/edit permissions), preview common file types (images, PDFs), and download files.
evals.expected_output: Stories covering upload, organization, sharing, preview, and download with access control

assertions.name: upload_story
assertions.description: Upload story includes drag-and-drop and click-to-browse variants

assertions.name: folder_organization
assertions.description: Stories for creating folders, moving files, nested folders

assertions.name: sharing_permissions
assertions.description: Stories distinguishing view vs edit sharing permissions

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Criteria include file size limits, type restrictions

assertions.name: edge_cases
assertions.description: Duplicate filenames, storage quota, broken previews

evals.prompt: Write user stories for adding a dashboard with customizable widgets. Users can add/remove widgets (charts, stats, recent activity, quick actions), drag to reorder, resize widgets, and save their layout. Default layout for new users.
evals.expected_output: Stories for widget management, layout customization, persistence, and defaults

assertions.name: widget_crud
assertions.description: Stories for adding, removing, and configuring widgets

assertions.name: drag_reorder
assertions.description: Story for drag-to-reorder with layout persistence

assertions.name: default_layout
assertions.description: Story for default dashboard layout for new users

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Criteria include saving across sessions, reset to default

assertions.name: priorities
assertions.description: Core widget display P0, customization P1, resize P2
